suggestions.description: Pre-existing test failures (2): memorias tests expect limite=20 but code uses 50 (changed in a previous sprint). Not caused by this sprint. Should be fixed eventually by updating tests to expect 50.
Consider adding onOpenChange handler to AlertDialog to call blocker.reset() when dialog is dismissed via Escape key or overlay click, ensuring consistent behavior.
The file is now ~1300 lines. Consider extracting tab contents into sub-components (TabGeral, TabHorarios, TabAusencias) in a future refactor to improve maintainability.
New utility file created as out-of-scope refactor (not in PRD). Harmless, but should be documented if committed.

qa_result.summary: Iteration 2 QA after fix of critical cadastrar_lote transaction regression. All PRD acceptance criteria verified. TypeScript: 0 errors. Tests: 47/49 pass (2 pre-existing failures in memorias.spec.ts from prior sprint, not caused by this task). The critical fix is confirmed: cadastrar_lote uses per-item try/catch with partial success semantics (no transaction wrapper). mutacoes-contrato.spec.ts: 5/5 pass. All frontend changes verified: router migration (createHashRouter + RouterProvider + Outlet), sidebar cleanup (only Feriados in configNav, NAV_CONTRATOS/NAV_REGRAS removed from tour), ConfiguracoesPagina Collapsible Avancado with IA card + Links Rapidos, dirty state (useDirtyGuard + DirtyGuardDialog applied to 4 pages), ColaboradorDetalhe tabs (3 tabs, unified card, Form wraps Tabs), sexo fix (empty default, Zod validation, toolError in criar/cadastrar_lote). Layout Contract intact (no overflow-y-auto on page wrappers, no scrollIntoView). No security issues, no debug logs, no hardcoded secrets.

previous_issues_resolved.description: cadastrar_lote transaction wrapper reverted to per-item try/catch, restoring partial success semantics. mutacoes-contrato.spec.ts 5/5 pass.
Scope creep (date-utils refactor, bloqueadoDom rewrite) left as-is per user instruction. Harmless refactors that don't break tests.
date-utils.ts new file left as-is. Harmless utility extraction.
